subject: DeltaHire interviewers cannot edit scorecards after panel assignment
summary: DeltaHire interviewers received scorecard tasks but the evaluation form opened in read-only mode.
cause: Interviewers were invited as observers rather than panel interviewers during a stage template migration.
resolution: Permissions and Workflow repaired role assignment and regenerated scorecard tasks.

subject: VectorAI Interviewer cannot open evaluation scorecard
summary: VectorAI reported interviewer cannot open evaluation scorecard during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Interviewer was not added to the hiring team
resolution: Added interviewer to the hiring team and reissued task

subject: Willow Pharma Confidential scorecard field visible to wrong role
summary: Willow Pharma reported confidential scorecard field visible to wrong role during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Role inherited a restricted field group
resolution: Adjusted role field visibility and audited access

subject: XenoFleet Hiring manager feedback form read-only
summary: XenoFleet reported hiring manager feedback form read-only during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Feedback form was locked after stage transition
resolution: Unlocked the feedback form for the active stage

subject: YieldWise Interview stage missing scorecard template
summary: YieldWise reported interview stage missing scorecard template during a recruiting workflow.
cause: Stage had no active scorecard template
resolution: Attached the scorecard template and regenerated tasks
